mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, proc_json, proc_view_json, proc_version, proc_key, proc_name, business_type, config, form_model_re_id, app_key
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_de_process (gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, proc_json, proc_view_json, proc_version, proc_key, proc_name, business_type, config, form_model_re_id, app_key) values (#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{procJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{procViewJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{procVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{config,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{formModelReId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update t_wf_de_process set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, proc_json = #{procJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, proc_view_json = #{procViewJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, proc_version = #{procVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, proc_key = #{procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_name = #{procName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, business_type = #{businessType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, config = #{config,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, form_model_re_id = #{formModelReId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_de_process (gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, proc_json, proc_view_json, proc_version, proc_key, proc_name, business_type, config, form_model_re_id, app_key) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.procJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.procViewJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.procVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.businessType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.config,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.formModelReId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select
from t_wf_de_process where proc_key=#{procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1

select proc_key, business_type from t_wf_de_process where proc_key in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
